qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Attempt missed. Ismaël Gharbi (Tunisia) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Hazem Mastouri with a cross.

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ali Abdi (Tunisia) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the left. Assisted by Anis Ben Slimane with a cross.

events.description: 阿里·阿布迪射门偏出。 阿尼斯·斯利曼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Denzel Dumfries (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt blocked. Frenkie de Jong (Netherlands) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.
Corner, Tunisia. Conceded by Nathan Aké.
Attempt saved. Anis Ben Slimane (Tunisia) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Yan Valery with a cross.

events.description: 阿尼斯·斯利曼射正。 颜·瓦莱里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Tijjani Reijnders (Netherlands) wins a free kick on the right wing.

events.description: 蒂贾尼·雷恩德斯射正。 唐耶尔·马伦参与进攻。
